FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Technical Breakout Above MA20 Confirms USD Strength Amid Hawkish Central Bank Shifts

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] DOWN: Washington Rebuffs CBDC, Whale Accumulation Slows, MA20 Exaptation Persists
